package rulecoverage

func NegativeDomainEntityContainsJsonTagsWithoutBoundaryException() string {
    ruleID := "domain_entity_contains_json_tags_without_boundary_exception"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Core domain entities that are directly annotated for API serialization without a deliberate boundary exception."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
